Good morning. I'm Marc Dubois. I work at Sanofi Global, in Paris. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you, Marc. My name is Emmanuele Orrico, and I work at Sanofi Brazil.
Great. And what do you do there?
I am the national demand manager. I manage the immunology portfolio in Brazil.
Immunology. So, which disease areas are you responsible for?
I am responsible for eight disease areas. Asthma, COPD and atopic dermatitis, for example.
Excellent. In August, the Global team visits Brazil. Can you present the results?
Yes. I present the results, the challenges and the opportunities.
I am the national demand manager for immunology.

Hello Emmanuele. This is Marc Dubois, from Sanofi Global, in Paris. I have good news. The Global team visits Brazil in the last week of August. We want to hear about your market. We have three questions for you. What are the results this year? What are the big challenges? And where are the opportunities? Please prepare a short presentation. Ten minutes is enough. Speak slowly and use simple words. That is perfect for us. See you in August.

Good morning, everyone. Welcome to the global immunology meeting. My name is Claire Bennett. I am the global brand director. Today we have four countries in this room. Brazil, France, Canada and Japan. Every country presents the results for one disease area. Please speak slowly and use simple words. English is not the first language for many people here. Nobody in this room speaks perfect English. We are here to understand each other. So, let us start with Brazil.
Good morning. My name is Emmanuele Orrico. I work at Sanofi, in Brazil. I am the national demand manager. I am responsible for eight disease areas in immunology. Nice to meet you.
